title: Vehicle Routing Optimization
summary: A web about Vehicle Routing Problem (VRP) built for a logistics company to optimize multi-vehicle delivery routes.
description: Digitizes the manual, paper-based route planning process for logistics company. Built with Python, Flask, and SQlite, users can input store demand, select vehicles, and system validates capacity before computing optimal routes based on actual road geometry. The output becomes estimated time, fuel cost, and paths for each vehicle.
captions: Overall dashboard view. Step 1: selecting the stores for delivery.
Step 2 : Input tonnage and volume for each store.
Step 3 : Selecting vehicles for the delivery.
Calculation output, automatically saved to delivery history.

title: Inventory Management System
summary: A digital internal platform built to track company stock, log expenses, and handle monthly stock checks in one place.
description: A web-based inventory management system, built with React, Vite, and Supabase. The system provides a real-time overview of total items, stock value, and depleted materials, with monthly charts for quantity, consumption, and total value. Users can manage inventory via CRUD, log material expenditures, and run monthly stock opname month-to-month tracking.
captions: Dashboard overview showing current inventory condition
Inventory management with all item list
Material expenditure log for consumed inventory items
Expenditure input form with quantity used and date fields
Monthly stock opname for tracking inventory condition per period

title: Cafe Management Web Application
summary: A lightweight cafe management system that connects inventory, menu, and sales with automatic ingredient tracking on every transaction.
description: (First client project — discontinued mid-development) A web-based management system for a small cafe, built with Python, Flask, and SQLite. The system covers inventory tracking with low-stock alerts, menu and recipe management linked to inventory, and sales logging with stock sufficiency validation. Unfinished, but functional for its core features.
captions: Dashboard with low-stock alerts, unavailable menu items, and recent sales activity
Inventory management with basic CRUD functionality
Menu list with recipe linkage to inventory items
Stock insufficient validation when sales input exceeds available inventory

title: Personal Website
summary: A personal space to document and share my work (projects, thoughts, or anything). Built as a living portfolio that grows over time.
description: My little corner of the internet. A living record of everything I build, learn, and think about. Started as a portfolio to showcase my projects, but over time will grow into something more to become a space for thoughts, stories, and whatever else is worth sharing. A lifelong work in progress.
